title: gonostemon flavopurpureus
intro: Gonostemon flavopurpureus, also known as the Purple Bush or Yellow Bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. It has been traditionally used in African folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gonostemon flavopurpureus include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Gonostemon flavopurpureus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for use in herbal remedies.
